creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun May 25 12:42:46 2014
New Revision: 355241
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/355241
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355241/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, sort *_DEPENDS
  
  PR:		ports/189611
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-Class-Workflow/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/p5-Class-Workflow/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Class-Workflow/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:42:41 2014	(r355240)
+++ head/devel/p5-Class-Workflow/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:42:46 2014	(r355241)
@@ -7,13 +7,16 @@ CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Lightweight workflow system
 
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Moose>=0.37:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Moose \
-		p5-Set-Object>=1.19:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Set-Object \
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Data-Compare>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Data-Compare \
+		p5-Moose>=0.37:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Moose \
 		p5-MooseX-Clone>=0.04:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-MooseX-Clone \
-		p5-Data-Compare>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Data-Compare \
+		p5-Set-Object>=1.19:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Set-Object \
 		p5-YAML-Syck>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-YAML-Syck
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
